free_text: Inelastic Proton Scattering from Zr-91 at 18.7 MeV.
An Enriched Selfsupporting Metal Foil of Zr-91,
State Detector was Used,Cooled to Dry Ice Temperatures.
The Full Width at Half Maximum of Most Peaks Varied
Between About 70 and 80 KeV Depending on the Angle.
.The 140 Cm Avf Cyclotron at the Vrije
- By Authors - Energy and the Angular Assymmetry of the
Beam were Determined by the Cross-Over Method Using
Polyethylene As a Target. In this Manner the Beam
Energy was Determined to be 18.7 +- 0.1 MeV and the
Beam Assymetry As O.3 Degree to the Left.
The Relative Errors are Smaller Than the Data Points
